title: GDACS disasters snapshot
description: Contract for data/realtime/gdacs_disasters/latest.json — current global disasters from the GDACS RSS 2.0 feed (UN/JRC).

generated_at_iso.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp (Z-suffixed) when the snapshot was written. Stamped by scrapers/lib/storage.py:write_latest_snapshot().

id.description: GDACS numeric event id (stored as string).

event_type.description: GDACS event type code: Earthquake, Tropical Cyclone, Flood, Volcano, Drought, Wildfire, Wind.

alert_score.description: GDACS numeric alert score. Observed range 0.0–1.0 in RSS but not formally capped; no maximum enforced.

description.description: HTML-stripped event description from the RSS item.

country.description: Affected country name as reported by GDACS (may be a region name such as 'Southeast Indian Ridge').

published_utc.description: RFC-822 pubDate from the RSS item (not strict ISO 8601).

latitude.description: Epicentre / centroid latitude, or null when GDACS omits geo:lat from the RSS item — observed in all current records.

longitude.description: Epicentre / centroid longitude, or null when GDACS omits geo:long from the RSS item — observed in all current records.

glide_number.description: GLIDE number for cross-agency reference, or empty string when GDACS does not assign one.

population_affected.description: Free-text population impact from GDACS <gdacs:population> element; may be empty.

tags.description: Optional <category> tags from the RSS item; usually an empty array.
